series_metadata.series_description: These files include banks that convert from a state charter, banks that did not open, and charter applications that were withdrawn or denied.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Microform: microfilm in operating area as well as off-site storage facility five (5) years from date of being withdrawn, denied, or cancelled ; Paper: paper copy in operating area imaged and indexed. Upon confirmation that paper copy has been checked quality and completeness, . ; Electronic: electronic files five (5) years from date of being withdrawn, denied, or cancelled
retention_rules.disposition_method: Microform: Shred ; Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
